## Outcome
Describe what worked and what you were able to do.

## Proof Commands Run
- [ ] `npx -y @jtalk22/slack-mcp --version`
- [ ] `npx -y @jtalk22/slack-mcp --doctor`
- [ ] `npx -y @jtalk22/slack-mcp --setup`

## Environment
- OS:
- Node.js version:
- Runtime mode: [stdio / web / http / worker]

## Time-to-First-Success
How long from install to first successful command?

## Optional Quote Permission
- [ ] Maintainer may quote this result publicly without personal identifiers.

## Optional Notes
Anything that made setup easier or harder?
